gitCommit.subject: fix(word-magic): plug ai_* fields into lightweight fetch — fixes toggle global [M8]
gitCommit.body:
fix(word-magic): plug ai_* fields into lightweight fetch — fixes toggle global [M8]

Root cause: PRODUCT_SELECT_LIGHTWEIGHT não incluía os campos AI, então
ai_title/ai_description/ai_summary/ai_version/ai_generated_at chegavam como
undefined nos cards. useWordMagic.hasEnrichment era sempre false.

Changes:
1. products-lightweight.ts:
   - Add ai_title, ai_description, ai_summary, ai_version, ai_generated_at
     to PRODUCT_SELECT_LIGHTWEIGHT (SELECT do PostgREST)
   - Add optional fields to LightweightProduct interface

2. useProductsLightweight.ts:
   - Add AI fields to mapLightweightToProduct return object:
     aiTitle, aiDescription, aiSummary, aiVersion, aiGeneratedAt

Flow after fix:
fetchPromobrindProductsLightweight
  → PRODUCT_SELECT_LIGHTWEIGHT (now includes ai_*)
  → mapLightweightToProduct (now maps ai_* → aiTitle/aiVersion etc.)
  → Product.aiVersion > 0 && Product.aiTitle
  → useWordMagic.hasEnrichment = true
  → isGlobalAIMode && hasEnrichment → isAIActive = true
  → ProductCard shows AI name + badge ✨ IA

Verified: 0 TS errors introduced. Word Magic toggle now functional.
